value: Thanks for reaching out about this. I understand your privacy concerns. To help you opt out of Nielsen measurement in our app, please go to your account settings and look for the privacy or data collection section—you should find an option there to disable Nielsen tracking. If you're having trouble locating it, let me know and I can walk you through the steps. Regarding the legality of opt-out consent, Nielsen's measurement practices are governed by industry standards and privacy regulations, though I'd recommend reviewing our privacy policy or Nielsen's own documentation for the full details on how your data is handled.
